Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal

Class MapVerifierImpl<K,V>

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractObjectVerifier<MapVerifier<K,V>,MapValidator<K,V>,Map<K,V>>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.MapVerifierImpl<K,V>
Type Parameters:
K - the type of key in the map
V - the type of value in the map
All Implemented Interfaces:
ExtensibleObjectVerifier<MapVerifier<K,V>,Map<K,V>>, MapVerifier<K,V>
public final class MapVerifierImpl<K,V> extends AbstractObjectVerifier<MapVerifier<K,V>,MapValidator<K,V>,Map<K,V>> implements MapVerifier<K,V>
Default implementation of MapVerifier.
